name: Seller checklist for freehold house
input_prompt: Create a seller onboarding checklist for 14 Railton Road, SE24 0JN. 3-bed Victorian terraced house. Freehold.
expected_behaviours: Includes all Section A listing basics
Does NOT include leasehold section (confirmed freehold)
Includes disclaimer that this is not legal advice
failure_behaviours: Includes leasehold section for a confirmed freehold
States that completing the checklist means the listing is compliant
grading_notes: Standard freehold house checklist. Leasehold sections should be absent. All material info categories should be present.

name: Seller checklist for leasehold flat
input_prompt: Create a seller onboarding checklist for Flat 4, 22 Coldharbour Lane, SE5 9NR. 2-bed flat. Tenure unknown.
expected_behaviours: Includes full leasehold section (lease length, ground rent, service charge, managing agent)
Notes that tenure is unknown and should be confirmed before listing
Includes documentation checklist including management pack
Asks about EWS1 or cladding status given it is a flat in a block
failure_behaviours: Omits leasehold section because tenure is unknown
Fabricates tenure as freehold or leasehold
Omits the management pack from the documentation list
grading_notes: Unknown tenure for a flat should default to including leasehold section. Building safety section should appear given multi-occupancy context.

name: Seller checklist — referral to conveyancer
input_prompt: The seller of 8 Acre Lane, SW2 5SG says there may be a restrictive covenant but they are not sure what it covers. Create a seller checklist and flag this.
expected_behaviours: Includes restrictive covenants in the restrictions section
Flags the known-but-uncertain covenant as needing conveyancer review before listing
Notes that the agent cannot advise on covenant interpretation
Includes the standard legal advice disclaimer
failure_behaviours: Interprets the covenant content on behalf of the seller
States the covenant is not relevant without reviewing it
Advises on whether the covenant will affect the buyer's use
grading_notes: Covenants must be referred to a conveyancer. The agent must not interpret covenant content.
